grant_and_term.grant_type: Non-exclusive license to develop and operate one Shop
grant_and_term.territory_conditions: Not exclusive; subject to Reserved Rights; Designated Territory per Schedule 1
grant_and_term.sales_restrictions: On-premises, carryout, delivery within territory, catering within territory only
grant_and_term.franchisor_can_prohibit: Soliciting customers outside territory; delivery outside territory

fee_obligations.application_of_payments: Franchisor sole discretion to apply payments to any indebtedness
fee_obligations.withholding_unlawful: Franchisee may NEVER withhold payments, even claiming franchisor non-performance

training_obligations.initial_training: 2 weeks, 80 hours, mandatory for Managing Owner + 1 manager
training_obligations.system_wide_training: Up to 5 days/year, all costs on franchisee

operational_obligations.pricing: Franchisor may set max, min, and promotional prices
operational_obligations.data_access: Franchisor has independent access to all business data
operational_obligations.digital_media: All accounts must be assigned to franchisor

non_curable_defaults: 3+ curable defaults even if cured each time
Abandonment or failure to maintain lease
Disclosure of Operations Manual or confidential info
Execution levied against business; unsatisfied judgment 30 days
Foreclosure on equipment lien not dismissed in 60 days
curable_10_day: Failure to pay any fees/obligations (if not intentional)
Failure to pay suppliers without legal justification

transfer_restrictions.rofr: Franchisor may match any third-party offer

noncompete_scope.during_term: No ownership, operation, management, funding, or services for any Competitive Business; no diversion of customers; 3% publicly-traded exception
noncompete_scope.post_term_geography: Restricted Territory = Designated Territory + 25-mile radius + 10-mile radius of any other Delah Coffee Shop territory

guaranty.scope: All Owners and Spouses must guarantee ALL obligations under FA
guaranty.form: Owner and Spouse Agreement and Guaranty (FA Exhibit 1)

liquidated_damages.note: FA Art. 18.J waives punitive/exemplary/consequential/speculative damages BUT carves out lost profits/fees that would have been payable absent breach. This effectively allows franchisor to claim remaining-term royalties as damages.

venue_and_dispute_resolution.mediation: Non-binding, AAA, Alameda County CA, within 45 days of mediator selection
venue_and_dispute_resolution.arbitration: Binding, AAA, one arbitrator, Alameda County CA, within 180 days of demand
venue_and_dispute_resolution.injunctive_relief: Franchisor may bypass mediation/arbitration for injunctive claims
venue_and_dispute_resolution.consent_to_jurisdiction: Alameda County CA courts; franchisor may also sue where business located or franchisee resides
venue_and_dispute_resolution.governing_law: California (excluding choice-of-law rules and state franchise statutes unless independently applicable)

insurance_requirements.property: 100% of value, special form, $5K max deductible
insurance_requirements.proof_required: Earlier of 90 days after effective date or before training

indemnification.scope: All claims arising from franchisee's operation, except franchisor's gross negligence or willful misconduct
indemnification.franchisor_indemnifies_franchisee: Only for trademark infringement if franchisee in compliance

force_majeure.payment_obligation_excluded: Force majeure does NOT excuse payment of any fees including royalty and BDF

distinctive_clauses.description: Franchisee may NEVER withhold payments even if claiming franchisor non-performance
Franchisor may grant different terms to different franchisees at sole discretion; franchisee has no right to same treatment
Both parties waive right to class action or multi-party proceedings
Franchisee has no right to offset any amount owed to franchisor
2-year statute from act, or 1-year from discovery, whichever first (excludes franchisor payment claims, noncompete, indemnification)
Transfer does NOT relieve franchisee or owners/spouses of obligations
